vocab.meaning: giảm chấn động, giảm lực tác động
vocab.example: I'm a fan of high-tech running shoes because they are specifically designed to cushion the impact on my knees.

vocab.meaning: sự hỗ trợ chỉnh hình (giúp bảo vệ cấu trúc chân)
vocab.example: When it comes to daily wear, I prioritize footwear that offers excellent orthopaedic support to avoid back pain.

vocab.meaning: hợp thời trang, dẫn đầu xu hướng
vocab.example: I tend to go for fashion-forward sneakers that allow me to express my personality while staying comfortable.

vocab.meaning: chống chịu được thời tiết khắc nghiệt
vocab.example: I own a pair of heavy-duty leather boots because they can easily withstand the elements during the rainy season.

vocab.meaning: sự thanh lịch trong cách ăn mặc (thường dùng cho giày tây/đồ âu)
vocab.example: For formal events, I always opt for Oxford shoes to maintain a sense of sartorial elegance.
In the summer, I prefer loafers made from breathable fabric to keep my feet cool throughout the day.

vocab.meaning: đế giày chắc chắn, bền bỉ
vocab.example: These hiking boots feature a sturdy sole that provides exceptional grip on slippery terrains.

vocab.meaning: một sự bổ sung linh hoạt (dễ phối đồ)
vocab.example: A pair of white leather trainers is a versatile addition to any wardrobe since they pair well with almost anything.
Modern basketball shoes often incorporate state-of-the-art technology to enhance athletic performance.

vocab.meaning: sự thoải mái vô song (không gì sánh bằng)
vocab.example: Despite their simple appearance, these slip-ons provide unrivalled comfort for long-distance walking.
